title: EB voxel_groups write-time spatial materialization
description: Restore the BOX-ARCHITECTURE write-time-materialization principle to the voxel_groups semantic layer: persist per-group bbox/centroid when membership is set at Stage 4b, and read precomputed values at /spatial instead of recomputing a ~860K-row JOIN on every 60s poll. Conforms to the canonical voxel-group schema (Child 2).

outputs.description: Additive Prisma migration adding typed bounds columns to voxel_groups (bbox_min_x/max_x/min_y/max_y/min_z/max_z + centroid_x/y/z, DOUBLE PRECISION, nullable), mirroring the voxel_grids bbox_min/max precedent. Column shape conforms to the canonical voxel-group schema (Child 2).
acceptanceCriteria: Migration applies cleanly and idempotently on a fresh dev DB and on the existing dc1eaa5b dataset.
voxel_groups gains nine nullable bounds columns; no existing column altered or dropped.
prisma migrate deploy reproduces the table+columns from scratch (reproducibility holds).

outputs.description: Extend voxel-groups-materializer.ts (Stage 4b) to compute MIN/MAX of member voxel bounds and AVG of member coordinates over the membership SELECT it already runs, and persist into the OUT-1 columns at write time.
acceptanceCriteria: Materializer computes bbox/centroid in the same pass that sets voxel_urns; no extra full-table scan.
All group types covered, including LEVEL/SYSTEM that require the one-time intake aggregation (not only ROOM/TAKT_ZONE).
Re-running Stage 4b on the same membership yields identical bounds (deterministic).

outputs.description: Rewrite /spatial (voxel-groups.route.ts) to read the precomputed bounds columns and drop the LEFT JOIN voxels ON urn = ANY(voxel_urns) + GROUP BY. Emit bbox/centroid at the exact location decodeVoxelGroup() reads (uro-message-parsers.ts) so the consumer contract holds. Retain the #516 statement_timeout guard as defense-in-depth.
acceptanceCriteria: /spatial executes O(groups), not O(member voxels); no voxels JOIN in the query plan.
Response shape unchanged for the frontend; decodeVoxelGroup() reads bbox/centroid without fallback-to-zero.

outputs.description: One-time backfill (scripts/backfill-voxel-group-bounds.ts) computing bounds for the existing dc1eaa5b groups in a deliberate maintenance pass — the expensive aggregation run exactly once, never again at read.
acceptanceCriteria: All existing dc1eaa5b groups have non-null bounds after backfill.
Backfilled values equal the values OUT-2 would produce for the same membership (parity check passes).

outputs.description: CI guard (.github/workflows/voxel-groups-guard.yml) asserting /spatial cannot reintroduce the unbounded voxels JOIN, plus a frontend AbortController/in-flight guard on the 60s spatial poll.
acceptanceCriteria: CI fails if voxel-groups.route.ts reintroduces = ANY(voxel_urns) or a voxels JOIN in /spatial.
Frontend spatial poll aborts an in-flight request before issuing the next; no overlap.

outputs.description: Validation walk on dev against dc1eaa5b: Coordination renders all groups at building scale with voxel-true bounds/centroid/color, /spatial latency is O(groups), and Stage-4b re-materialization reproduces bounds deterministically.
acceptanceCriteria: Coordination tab renders every group with correct world-space bounds and centroid.
/spatial p95 latency flat as group count grows (no per-poll JOIN cost).
A re-provision via the intake pipeline reproduces the groups and their bounds.

preMerge: Unit test: materializer persists bounds matching MIN/MAX/AVG of a known fixture (OUT-2).
Query-plan test: /spatial contains no voxels JOIN (OUT-3, OUT-5).
Backfill parity check passes on dc1eaa5b (OUT-4).
postMerge: Dev Coordination renders dc1eaa5b groups with voxel-true bounds (OUT-6).

transitions.trigger: L4 approval of grounded direction (canonical voxel v3 + open-core cut)
EB PR #532 squash-merged to luh-tech/Ectropy-Business main by erik-luh (2026-06-23T19:01:27Z)
TRUTH-DELIVERED authored by SR-CLI; closed-with-debt (OUT-4 backfill of dc1eaa5b pending — not a close blocker)

notes: Root cause: voxel_groups (migration 20260605120000) carries voxel_urns + metadata JSONB but no typed bounds; /spatial recomputes per-group bbox/centroid via LEFT JOIN voxels ON urn = ANY(voxel_urns) (planner estimates ~10 rows, actual 21 groups x ~41K URNs ~= 860K probes/poll; GIN supports only @> reverse lookup, not the forward explode). This is the one rolled-up spatial reduction that skipped BOX-ARCHITECTURE-2026-03-26's 'cost paid once at write time, not at every read' discipline that voxel_grids.bbox and status rollup already follow. Execution-gated on Child 2 (voxel-group.schema.json) landing so OUT-1 columns conform to the canonical shape. #516 timeout guard is retained, not removed. Rationale-in-instance per no-md-terminus.
